questions.text: What is the main purpose of the period end closing process?
options: To finalize financial results of the business activities during a specific period.
To start recruitment for financial positions.
By fiscal year and ledger type.

questions.text: What has replaced data link upload for sending data from S/4 to Magnitude?
What can be done with posting period variants in the NEO system?
options: They can only be set up by the company code.
They allow scheduling for a group of entities at once.
They are different for each type of ledger.

questions.text: How are balances carried forward in NEO?
options: By one Fiori App for all ledgers.

questions.text: Which tool continues to be used for accounts reconciliation after NEO?
What happens if GR>IR in terms of GRIR reclassification?
options: GRIR balance is in the right group line, no need for reclass.

questions.text: After NEO, the FX valuation can only be run once.

If re-opening of a closed period needs to be done for one specific company, it will affect all others using
the same posting period variant.
Carryforward must be done for all ledgers, including any defined extension ledgers.
Which of the following scenarios would NOT be a valid reason to make a manual posting in SAP S/4?
options: A temporary disruption in the Blackline system functionality.
The need to post an entry directly to a sub-ledger account.
A problem with the automated clearing rules for bank transactions.
An employee forgets to enter an expense report before the monthly closing deadline.
